title: Blatium
description: A small mod for modpack makers with 2 unique, rare and powerful metals
body:
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blatium)
[![Image](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Modrinth&color=ECEBE6&labelColor=2F4858&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/blatium)

A small mod for modpack makers with 2 unique, rare and powerful metals, amor and tools.

Items in the mod are configured in the config (armor values, armor toughness, armor knockback resistance, tools damage and speed).

According to the default settings, the Nlium is generated in the edge on islands outside the start island.

Blatium and Nlium armor absorbs half of the damage, fall damage, impact damage when flying on elites, fire damage, explosion damage and prevents drowning.

The mod adds support for ProductiveBees, Mekanism, Thermal Series.

https://blatfan.carrd.co/
